execReport:
**Overall Status**
The AEGON technology initiative portfolio remains active with 24 ongoing initiatives across all delivery stages. Of these, 11 are pending AEGON's action — representing the primary bottleneck — while FH holds 1 item internally. Portfolio completion stands at 38% (26 of 68 total initiatives). Several Train milestone dates have slipped, requiring attention ahead of the next release window.

**This Week's Progress**
• #17 Pre-Authorizations & Reimbursements flow advanced to QA Approved — awaiting QA Global release approval before moving to Train
• #19 Valores Acima do Plafond moved from Pending FH into Business Requirements; requirements document due for AEGON review by 14 May
• #57 Medical Network Search – Service Not Required entered Train Testing and is now available for AEGON validation
• #68 Histórico de Estados completed tech review; awaiting sign-off to begin testing

**Key Actions Required**
• AEGON — 11 initiatives remain in Pending ASP status, several with no response for extended periods (e.g. #25 Data de Início do Risco since Feb, #15 Test Environment Alignment with production date now 10 months overdue)
• AEGON — Train testing validation required for #57 Medical Network Search and #16 Lateralidades nas Exclusões, both currently available in Train environment
• AEGON — Review and sign-off on requirements for #19 Valores Acima do Plafond before 14 May to maintain delivery timeline
